results.name: clearinghouse_adl_orchestrator
results.transport_error:
sdk: Exception: Command failed with exit code 1 (exit code: 1)
Error output: Check stderr output for details
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: signer's exact prototype kept verbatim per attempt-3 explicit directive (signature check overrides the rename-params guidance from attempts 2/4 since renaming params themselves is forbidden); params immediately rebound to HLIL-bound aliases so every let-binding in the body matches il_vars; removed the shadow-on-Option that triggered the oracle_data.0 complaint.

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: Per-position liquidation/margin check: spot-0 case uses clearinghouse spot state; otherwise looks up oracle entry, fetches asset, calls compute_per_position_liq_margin, caps margin to max constant, applies HYPE/ZXQJ floor (10^16) via option_unit_qty_cmp.
